global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with promotional text and food illustrations.
global.main_message: Promoting fast food delivery with a special offer.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Two food items
elements.description: A simple illustration of two food items in a rectangular frame, suggesting a meal selection.

elements.label: Additional food item
elements.description: An additional food item illustration, similar in style to the first, positioned to the left.

elements.label: Fast food promotion
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Fast food, fast' with a smaller line below it that reads 'Free delivery over $15'.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Shop now' in white, set against a light background.

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: The logo 'SnapMeal' appears in a bold font at the top left corner, colored white.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small circular badge in yellow with the word 'SALE' in bold, contrasting text.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in white text on a dark background, positioned at the top left.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, fast food delivery promotion
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the center, the app screenshot is in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fast food, fast, Free delivery over $15, €19.99, Shop now, SnapMeal, SALE, UGC
embedding_texts.elements_text: app_screenshot: A simple illustration of two food items in a rectangular frame, suggesting a meal selection. | unknown: An additional food item illustration, similar in style to the first, positioned to the left. | headline: Bold white text stating 'Fast food, fast' with a smaller line below it that reads 'Free delivery over $15'. text='Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15' | cta: A rounded button with the text 'Shop now' in white, set against a light background. text='€19.99 Shop now' | logo: The logo 'SnapMeal' appears in a bold font at the top left corner, colored white. text='SnapMeal' | discount_badge: A small circular badge in yellow with the word 'SALE' in bold, contrasting text. text='SALE' | social_proof: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in white text on a dark background, positioned at the top left. text='UGC'
